calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-05-2026 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Jan-21-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:31am and concluding at 10:01am.

Plaintiff Interstate Fire and Casualty Company appearing represented by Alex Getman, Esq. via zoom.
Defendant Creatively Built, Inc. was not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

Court examines Plaintiff RYAN JANICKI and he confirms statements made by counsel.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Interstate Fire and Casualty Company, and against Defendant Creatively Built, Inc., as follows:

1. General Liability Policy Number MXC07012059 is hereby rescinded.
2. IFCC shall return to CBI premiums paid by CBI to IFCC.
3. IFCC has no duty to defend CBI.
4. IFCC has no duty to indemnify CBI.

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.
